# 30-Day Research Plan

## Objective

Build a repeatable distribution engine from controlled creative tests.

```text
30 days
→ 30–45 posts/variants
→ 10 hypotheses tested
→ 3–5 scalable mechanisms identified
```

## Week 1: Research and creative genome

### Tasks

```text
Day 1: collect 30 top videos in niche
Day 2: tag first frames and hooks
Day 3: tag text/caption systems
Day 4: tag story formats and CTAs
Day 5: identify 5 recurring winner mechanisms
Day 6: script 10 videos using those mechanisms
Day 7: produce first 3–5 test videos
```

### Output

```text
30-video swipe file
5 strongest mechanisms
10 scripts
3–5 ready-to-post tests
```

## Week 2: First-frame and hook lab

### Tests

```text
same topic, different first frame
same body, different hook
same first frame, different hook tension
```

### Variants

```text
face open
before/after split
result first
visible problem
data/proof screenshot
```

### Metrics

```text
chose-to-view
1–3s retention
early drop-off
```

## Week 3: Text, story, and proof lab

### Tests

```text
captions only vs headline + captions
labels vs full captions
heavy central text vs safe-zone text
problem-test-result vs pure advice
proof early vs proof late
```

### Metrics

```text
average percentage viewed
completion
saves
profile clicks
```

## Week 4: CTA, platform, and scale lab

### Tests

```text
save CTA vs send CTA
comment A/B vs open prompt
follow for series vs follow for more
search-first vs feed-first packaging
platform-native edit vs blind cross-post
```

### Metrics

```text
saves per reach
sends per reach
comments per reach
follows per 1,000 views
7d/30d long-tail traffic
```

## End-of-month review

Sort all videos by:

```text
views
chose-to-view / early retention
completion
saves per 1,000 views
sends per 1,000 views
follows per 1,000 views
7d and 30d traffic
```

Then decide:

```text
Top retention mechanisms → scale packaging.
Top save mechanisms → make templates/checklists.
Top send mechanisms → build identity/social formats.
Top follow mechanisms → turn into named series.
Top search mechanisms → build evergreen library.
```
